events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage like no other. Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger!

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: The Day Music TV Changed
angles.copy: Remember the day music videos changed everything? 45 years ago, MTV launched and gave us a whole new way to experience our favourite artists.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Britpop's Big Bang
angles.copy: It was the album that launched a thousand singalongs and defined a generation. Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns another year older. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering the King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: A Guitar Legend Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, whose groundbreaking music continues to resonate decades after his passing.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: The Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: That album cover. Those songs. The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released this day back in '69. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and inspiring after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune featuring that iconic voice?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (UK single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine's Message Endures
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: The Day Music Went Mobile
angles.copy: Remember life before? Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod changed how we listened to music forever. What was on your first playlist?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 007 and his incredible cinematic legacy.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring music and message of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Royalty's Birthday
angles.copy: From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a very happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles released The White Album
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The Iconic Double Album
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles gave us the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A truly groundbreaking double LP.
